testcase.name: test_super_admin_barbershops_list

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'barbershops': [{'address': 'Rua Demonstração, 123 - São Paulo, SP', 'background_color': '#09090B', 'barbershop_id': 'barb_c04b680652ff', 'created_at': '2026-01-29T00:19:09.852637+00:00', ...}], 'page': 1, 'pages': 1, 'total': 1}, list)

testcase.failure: backend/tests/test_final_verification.py:157: in test_super_admin_barbershops_list assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'barbershops': [{'address': 'Rua Demonstração, 123 - São Paulo, SP', 'background_color': '#09090B', 'barbershop_id': 'barb_c04b680652ff', 'created_at': '2026-01-29T00:19:09.852637+00:00', ...}], 'page': 1, 'pages': 1, 'total': 1}, list)
